unexpected_findings.claim_violated: Prompt step 6 expected 0 PSLQ hits at dps=300 over the extended basis. Observed 4 hits.
unexpected_findings.details: 4 of 24 reference Trans families admit non-phantom L-bearing PSLQ relations at every dps level in {50,100,150,200,250,300} against basis {L, sqrt(2,3,5,17), pi, log2, zeta(3), 1}. Same 4 also hit at dps=300 against the extended basis {L, L^2, sqrt(17), pi, log2, zeta(3), e, gamma, 1}.
unexpected_findings.impact_on_conjecture: Trans -2/9 stratum membership conjecture NOT falsified. All four limits remain transcendental by Lindemann-Weierstrass (pi is). The auxiliary intuition that all 24 reference Trans -2/9 families are 'Trans-hard against {1, sqrt-rationals, pi, log2, zeta(3)}' is weakened: 4 of 24 admit closed forms in (1/2)*Q(pi).
unexpected_findings.mitigation: Layer-5 protocol updated to record (slope, accept_pattern_per_dps) jointly. Trans-hard now defined as accept_pattern == [F]*6. Closed-form Trans is a new sub-classification.
